free_text: The angular distributions of elastic scattering of
HI-13 Tandem accelerator
A movable Faraday cup was placed behind the
target to monitor the beam intensity, which was used
for the absolute normalization of the reaction cross
sections.
The Q3D magnetic spectrometer has a
high-energy resolution of approximately 0.02%. The
reaction products were separated by Q3D and then
measured by a 50 mm x 50 mm two-dimensional position-
sensitive silicon detector.
A dE-E detector telescopic system was set at
approximately 23 deg downstream of the reaction
targets for the cross-check of the beam intensity.
The experimental errors
The statistical error (3%)
